{{Infobox technique
| name = Lagomorph Contract
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Lagomorph Contract is a widespread form of rabbit-summoning magic. It allows a practitioner to call forth various entities from the [[Aether]], ranging from single muscular, man-sized rabbits with notched ears to specialized combatants. These summons can include armored humanoid rabbits equipped with rifles, targeting lenses, and drones, as well as specialized '[[Thundertails]]' that utilize lightning. The summoned creatures can act as combat artists or defensive lines, sometimes operating through conjured eyes and hands even when the caster lacks direct control. Using this magic can result in a debt to the [[Lagomorphs]] that may take months to repay. While some consider it an inferior form of magic, it is a powerful tool capable of being used in major conflicts, such as wars against the Advocates.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Lagomorph Contract]] allows the summoning of two large rabbits from the [[Aether]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c23">''The Captain'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator relies on a [[Lagomorph Contract]] for protection.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c11">''The Engineer'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Lagomorph Contract]] is a rabbit-summoning magic used by the narrator.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c12">''The Engineer'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Lagomorph Contract]] is used to summon [[Thundertails]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c15">''The Engineer'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Lagomorph Contract]] consists of muscled Combat Artists who take point in battles.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
